feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to Add Predefined Values to the ADSMTP-REMARK Field in T-Code BP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a task to enhance the tcode BP so that when the client adds email addresses in the ADSMTP-REMARK field, they have predefined values to choose from, like a search help or drop-down list. Is that possible and how?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP JOB log pages limit
entry.content:
Hello Everyone.  

I have below query related to SAP Job log 

a) what is the maximum SAP job log page view limit in SAP.
b) can we search on pages not viewable from SAP job log.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: xfp output of Adobe form to be converted pdf
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have spool generated for ADOBE form but in binary format. I am using the FM, 'CONVERT_ABAPSPOOLJOB2_PDF' to convert it to PDF. But getting the error that spool job type is 'BINARY', so getting the error that, 'no abap spool job is ready' , though I have the spool request. Pl provide the solution.

Rgds,

G.Khadeer Basha

entry.title: Determine class structure / components (local class, test classes, ...)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for a solution to determine the structure / components of a class.

Regarding "structure and/or components" I mean for example local classes or test classes of a global class!
I do NOT want to analyze attributes or methods by using a type descriptor.

So I guess that tables exist where such information CCAU, CCDEF etc. are stored...

Can anyone give me a hint, in which tables such information is stored?
I would start retrieving the class name of a global class by reading table TADIR.

Maybe there is a "static" variant of a solution by reading several tables or a "dynamic" variant by using any kind of RTTI?

BR

entry.title: In ALV When clicked on button of a cell, other cell populate some value (SY-DATUM)
entry.content:
Hi all,

In my ALV report output I have 3 columns, here two are editable. For one column we had a button and when we click on that in same row of second column need to fetch SY-DATE and third column is going to have a manual entry. How we can implement this logic.

entry.title: Create folder structure in a shared network folder with SAP
entry.content:
Hello, good day to all
I have a shared network folder with SAP, but I need to create a folder structure to save some files from SAP. Can someone guide me to carry out this process?

Thank you very much

entry.title: Custom changes in GGB1 doesn't carry over or apply
entry.content:
So we created a custom logic in GGB1 specifically in exit U0001. Z_OBJECT calls the U0001. 

Since the ZOBJECT, I have created a logic for BSEG-FDTAG.

Initially, the value of BSEG-FDTAG is initial and my logic is below:

BSEG-FDTAG = SY-DATUM + BSEG-ZBD1T. Assuming the values will be 08/31/2024

However, after exiting the ZOBJECT, the value of BSEG-FDTAG will be 00000000 again. Why does that happen?

The flow of FDTAG determination is like this:

ZOBJECT> sapff001> ZOBJECT. 

The first time it will go through the ZOBJECT the FDTAG will be 08/31/2024. Then it will go to the program sapff001, there, the value of FDTAG will be 00/00/0000 before computation.

There is a computation for FDTAD in sapff001 however, the conditions were not satisfied hence, I'm not getting the correct results.

entry.title: Building an ABAP RESTful Application
entry.content:
Hi, just going through this course https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/learn-the-basics-of-abap-programming-on-sap-btp and I think that the provided Groceries table definition script is maybe outdated, because when trying to generate ABAB Repository Objects, the validation status complains that:

Field for change user is missing in source reference ZAU_GROCERY type TABL.

Field for change user is missing in source reference ZAU_GROCERY type TABL.

Changing from "createdby : abap.char(12)" to "createdby : abp_creation_user" and from "lastchangedby : abap.char(12)" to "last_changed_by : abp_lastchange_user" makes it work.

It's not clear what to use, and there may be other ways to do it.

With kind regards,

Alex

entry.title: ALV Display - Custom Column Name - cl_salv_table
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Any idea on the reason why this is not working. I can't get the custom column name in the report dispaly.

 


TYPES: BEGIN OF gty_data,

matnr TYPE matnr, " Material Number

sernr TYPE gernr, " Serial Number

pin TYPE string, " PIN (Assuming PIN as a string)

END OF gty_data,

gty_tab_data TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF gty_data.

 

 

METHOD display_data.

TRY.

cl_salv_table=>factory( IMPORTING r_salv_table = DATA(lr_alv)

CHANGING t_table = ct_data ).

CATCH cx_salv_msg.

ENDTRY.

TRY.

lr_alv->get_layout( )->set_key( VALUE #( report = sy-repid ) ).

lr_alv->get_layout( )->set_default( abap_true ).

lr_alv->get_layout( )->set_save_restriction( if_salv_c_layout=>restrict_none ).

lr_alv->get_functions( )->set_all( abap_true ).

lr_alv->get_columns( )->get_column( 'pin' )->set_long_text( 'PIN' ).

lr_alv->get_columns( )->get_column( 'pin' )->set_medium_text( 'PIN' ).

lr_alv->get_columns( )->get_column( 'pin' )->set_short_text( 'PIN' ).

CATCH cx_salv_not_found.

ENDTRY.

CALL METHOD lr_alv->display.

ENDMETHOD.



Thanks in advance.

entry.title: CDS view field date element alpha routine
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a field that displays a document number. For some kinds of document type, document number should be display as it is in the DB, while for some kinds of document type, document number should remove leading zeroes and this can be done by alpha routine in data element.

My question is, can I use different date elements casting against the document type (CASE WHEN)? I tried but looks like only the first date element is working.

Anyone could give some help here?

Regards,

Ming

entry.title: Offloading XLSX and DOCX document attachments from ECC and loading them to S4
entry.content:
Trying to download document attachments from ECC and load them to S4.
We run a custom download program on the ECC side. Assuming type is BKPF:
  Step1. Call method cl_binary_relation=>read_links to read existing attachments using awkey.
  Step2. Loop thru the links and read them via call FM SO_DOCUMENT_READ_API1.
  Step3. With filetype BIN, call FM GUI_DOWNLOAD with the hex output from step 2.

On the S4 side:
  Step1. Call function 'GUI_UPLOAD' to read the downloaded files from the extract, with filetype ‘BIN’ .
  Step2. Call FM SO_DOCUMENT_INSERT.
  Step3. Call method cl_binary_relation=>create_link

All the downloaded files are “successfully” attached to the document.
If you check the attachments in FB03, it works fine with PDF, XLS, DOC files, but does not work with XLSX and DOCX.
When opening an XLSX we get this as if it was opened in Notepad.

Also, if we open a downloaded XLSX directly from the output folder:

Thanks

Leo

entry.title: BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE CHANGE HKONT
entry.content:
Hi All,

 I am using BAPI BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE to develop an interface, Users need to modify the General Ledger Account Fields (hkont), but when I use table:glaccountdata receive 'hkont', BAPI reports an error Message No:ME038.

And when I use MIRO to  process the service and modify the 'hkont', it can be work correctly.

Please suggest how can I use BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE to change 'hkont'?

entry.title: Assignment of a purchase/sales contract to exchange agreement
entry.content:
I created a purchase contract using BAPI_CONTRACT_CREATE and an exchange agreement using BAPI_EXGAREMNT_CREATE. My issue is I am unable to assign the purchase contract created from BAPI to the exchange agreement created. Any help regarding this?

The requirement is to create purchase contract and exchange agreement for IS-OIL specific fields. Can anyone help me with this?

entry.title: I have a requirement that Same user can't park and post document (fbv0) can any help by using BTE.
entry.content:
I tried using BTE,  .. its not working for me either i am configuring it wrong or my logic is wrong..

+ I am getting confused which BTE should i use.

I tried with 1120 with following logic

Data lv_post_user type bkfp-unam

Lv _park_user type bkpf-unam

If sy-tcode ='fbv0'.

Select unam

From bkpf

Into lv_park_user

Where belnr eq i_belner ("importing para of 1120fm)

Lv_post_user =sy-uname

If lv_park_user = lv_post_user.

Message e007(jibs)

Endif.

Endif

entry.title: Send notifications in ATC only in error cases
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to use ATC to run unit tests in packages automatically and periodically.

Furthermore I would like to send a notification, e.g. via mail or SBWP, for each run to specific receivers.

So far, I know that this is possible.

Now, I am looking for a way only to send notifications if at least 1 unit tests fails.

Is this possible? Can anyone give me a tip?

BR

entry.title: How to validate at least one digital signature available in PDF file or not
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

I am processing some invoices but before processing I have to validate if at least one digital signature available in the same PDF file or not.

I tried to check some solutions here and there but have not found any without API and ADS.

Is there any solution/option to achieve this without using API and ADS?

 

I would appreciate your answer.

 

Regards,

Maneesha

entry.title: Adobe PDF file generated from Spool opening
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

   I have generated the PDF file from spool using the FM, FPCOMP_CREATE_PDF_FROM_SPOOL , but pdf generated is getting stored in the path, 'E:\usr\sap\DEV\SYS\global\SPOOL0000030004_00000.cfg'. This file not getting opened to display the pdf document. Any resolution for this issue ?

Rgds,

G.Khadeer Basha

entry.title: In RAP API unmanaged scenario with draft, Finalized method getting called during patch call
entry.content: Hello all, I am working on RAP API ( OData V4 UI ) unmanaged scenario with draft, so while every patch call ( entering field value ) save sequence methods ( finalize, save..etc ) is getting called. What can be wrong, Is it possible to avoid save sequence methods during patch call?. Thank You

entry.title: Send mail using cl_bcs via SAP distribution list
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to send a mail by using class cl_bcs and a SAP internal distribution list.

That means, I want to create a SAP internal distribution list via SBWP, eg:

Then I want to maintain the mail addresses of recipients in this distribution list.

Then I want to send a mail to this distribution list.

Please do NOT provide any solutions by using deprecated FM SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_SEND_API1!

How could this work? Any got an idea? How can I specifcy / create a recipient object that refers to the distribution list?

BR

entry.title: PO Modification only print the line changed in the pdf embeded in modification email
entry.content:
Hi
We are trying to reove message sending on delivery completed for POs.

We first went to SPRO : Materials Management > Purchasing > Messages > Fields relevant to printouts of changes and deselect PO column

We then had to come to SPRO and add
Materials Management > Purchasing > Messages > Output Control > Message type > define message type for purchase order > Maintain Message Types for PO
We have set Program to FM06AEND and FORM routine to CHANGE_FLAG.

 

It seems to wok but now when we change a line (material) in the PO, instead of receiving the whole new PO attached as PDF, the PDF only contains the line changed.

Do you know where this could come from ? Or do you know what is the abap program called to generate the PO PDF ?

 

Thanks
